faqs.question: How much is the intake across all courses being offerred at Samarpan Institute of Nursing and Paramedical Sciences?

review_content.Placements: In our course, the placement scenario is average and still developing. The college makes efforts every year through the placement cell and campus drives, but the overall percentage of students placed is not very high. A limited number of students manage to secure offers, so the placement percentage remains lower than expected. When it comes to salary packages, most offers are at the entry level range. Some students receive comparatively better packages, but in general, the lowest and average packages remain around industry standards. Very high packages have not been observed so far.

reviews_list.review_title: It is not a good college for students who want to do something in life.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements. They use big sentences to make a good image of their college in your eyes, but everything is fake.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi for students or a hostel for boys. Classrooms are not good. They shift the classrooms every week. Labs are quite good, but they do not have a lab assistant, so our teacher has to handle that.
review_content.Faculty: Only a few teachers have experience, while others are like nursery teachers. They used to focus on the syllabus, not on whether students understood it. Completing the syllabus is the most important thing to them. They didn't tell us the internal exam results.
